transformations.action: Convert the Date column to datetime using the parameters supplied in the JSON contract.
Sort the panel chronologically using the JSON-specified sort settings.
Reshape the long-format panel into a wide panel using the JSON-defined pivot parameters.
Validate that the expected reshaped schema is present.
Validate that the reshaped dataset contains one row per Date and REF_AREA combination.
Validate that Date and REF_AREA remain available for downstream joins.
Validate that Date remains datetime-typed after reshaping.
Apply the JSON-defined missing-value strategy to the generated feature columns.
